hero.title: Turn your resume into a portfolio that gets you hired
hero.subtitle: Upload your resume or answer 12 quick questions. Claude reads your experience, writes the copy, and builds your portfolio. The whole thing takes about 60 seconds.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade if you need a custom domain or analytics. No hidden fees.

builder.no_preview_help: Fill in the form on the left and publish to see your portfolio live on this side of the page.
